title: Guehi and Stones set to start for England in World Cup quarter-final

zh.summary: 英格兰前锋哈里·凯恩淡化了与埃尔林·哈兰德的直接比较，强调了他们不同的风格和优势。凯恩表示相信英格兰有能力在世界杯后期阶段达到最佳状态。

title: Sources: Greenwood could opt for Fener or Atleti
summary: Mason Greenwood, under contract with Marseille through 2029, is considering offers from both Fenerbahçe and Atlético Madrid, according to sources. The former Manchester United player is exploring alternatives despite his current Ligue 1 commitment.
content: Former Manchester United player Mason Greenwood, who is under contract with Marseille through 2029, is considering offers from Fenerbahce and Atlético Madrid, sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：格林伍德可能选择芬内巴切或马竞
zh.summary: 据消息人士透露，与马赛签约至2029年的梅森·格林伍德正在考虑来自费内巴切和马德里竞技的报价。这位前曼联球员正在探索替代选择，尽管他目前仍受法甲合同约束。

title: Spain strike late to book WC semifinal with France...
summary: Spain secured a 2-1 victory over Belgium in the World Cup quarterfinal with a decisive late goal, advancing to the semifinals to face France. A familiar face delivered the crucial winner for La Roja.
content: In an outcome that felt inevitable for most of the game, Spain beat Belgium 2-1 with a late goal from a familiar face Friday.

zh.title: 西班牙后发制人晋级世界杯半决赛对阵法国
zh.summary: 西班牙凭借一粒决定性的后期进球以2-1战胜比利时，赢得世界杯四分之一决赛，晋级半决赛对阵法国。一位熟悉的面孔为拉罗哈打进了关键一球。

title: Merino: 'Surreal' to net Spain's WC winner again
summary: Spain midfielder Mikel Merino came off the bench to score the crucial winning goal against Belgium with a 2-1 final score, advancing La Roja to the World Cup semifinals. Merino described the moment as surreal, reflecting his impact in the decisive match.
content: Spain midfielder Mikel Merino came off the bench to score a late winning goal against Belgium, securing a 2-1 victory and advancing La Roja to the World Cup semifinals.

zh.title: 梅里诺："不真实"的西班牙世界杯胜球者
zh.summary: 西班牙中场球员梅里诺替补出场，打入关键球帮助球队2-1击败比利时，晋级世界杯半决赛。梅里诺将这一时刻形容为"不真实的"，体现了他在这场决定性比赛中的重要作用。

title: Romero says leaky Argentina defense 'bothers us'
summary: Argentina defender Cristian Romero has acknowledged his team's ongoing defensive vulnerabilities ahead of the World Cup quarterfinal against Switzerland at Arrowhead Stadium on Saturday. The defensive issues are a concern for Argentina's prospects in the tournament.
content: Argentina defender Cristian Romero pointed out the ongoing defensive issues his team must fix to be successful in the quarterfinal match against Switzerland on Saturday at Arrowhead Stadium.

zh.title: 罗梅罗说漏洞百出的阿根廷防线"困扰我们"
zh.summary: 阿根廷后卫克里斯蒂安·罗梅罗在世界杯四分之一决赛对阵瑞士前承认球队存在的防线漏洞。这些防线问题令人担忧，将影响阿根廷在锦标赛中的前景。

title: Merino sends Spain to the semis, but La Roja need ...
summary: Mikel Merino's late goal sent Spain to the World Cup semifinals with victory over Belgium, yet the team exposed vulnerabilities in scoring despite possessing talented forward Lamine Yamal. Spain's advancement masks underlying issues that must be addressed.
content: You'd think a team boasting Lamine Yamal would score goals for fun, but to beat Belgium, Spain needed midfielder Mikel Merino to net the winner.

zh.title: 梅里诺送西班牙进半决赛，但西班牙红衣军团需要...
zh.summary: 梅里诺的晚期进球助西班牙战胜比利时挺进世界杯半决赛，但球队在进攻端暴露出漏洞，尽管拥有天才前锋拉米内·亚马尔。西班牙的晋级掩盖了必须解决的潜在问题。
